rationale.R1.6: 'Clean this up' maps unambiguously to prose-level editing: sentence clarity, word choice, paragraph cohesion, and reading flow. The artifact has several rough patches — awkward parentheticals, abrupt topic shifts mid-paragraph, and repetitive hedging — all squarely within writing-polish scope. Structural reorganization (R1.5) and logical consistency (R1.2) are boundary-relevant but not load-bearing given the delegation wording.
